testimonials.title: Chloe Bennett
testimonials.content: Ordered on Monday, wearing them by Wednesday. The quality is even better in person — I'll definitely be back.

testimonials.title: Mateo Rossi
testimonials.content: Exactly as pictured and beautifully made. The packaging was lovely and delivery was quick.

testimonials.title: Amara Okafor
testimonials.content: Gorgeous product and true to the photos. Delivery took a little longer than expected, but it was worth the wait.

testimonials.title: Ethan Clarke
testimonials.content: My third order from this shop and it never disappoints. Checkout was smooth and shipping was fast.

testimonials.title: Ingrid Larsen
testimonials.content: Excellent quality for the price. Soft, well-finished and exactly what I hoped for.

testimonials.title: Ravi Sharma
testimonials.content: Great value and a seamless checkout. Tracking kept me updated the whole way — highly recommend.
